title: hieracium murorum subsp. gentiliforme
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. gentiliforme is a lesser-known plant species within the Hieracium genus, commonly referred to as a type of hawkweed. It is reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium murorum subsp. gentiliforme is often used as a tincture, tea, or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
